scripts.check: npm run build --workspaces && npm run check --workspaces
scripts.demo:build: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
scripts.web:build: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run build --workspace @waveary/web
scripts.web:dev: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run dev --workspace @waveary/web
scripts.web:preview: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run build --workspace @waveary/web && npm run preview --workspace @waveary/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspaces && npm run test --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run test --workspace @waveary/core
